<a id="class-add-track"></a>

# Add_Track

**Inherits:** `PanelContainer`

Add local song from Local storage… if the song is a WAV it might use Waveform preview pluggin if FFMPEG doesn’t work

<a id="class-add-track-private-method-extension-hint-for-native-path-by-magic"></a>

`String` **\_extension_hint_for_native_path_by_magic**(native_path_string: `String`) [🔗](#class-add-track-private-method-extension-hint-for-native-path-by-magic)

Infers mp3/wav/ogg by reading the first bytes from the native picker URI. This works even when the native path has no extension (e.g. …/document/msf%3A1000000088). Returns “” when the type cannot be determined.

---

<a id="class-add-track-private-method-generate-and-assign-waveform-png"></a>

 **\_generate_and_assign_waveform_png**(audio_path: `String`) [🔗](#class-add-track-private-method-generate-and-assign-waveform-png)

Writes a waveform PNG next to the imported audio file and assigns [Song.Audio_File_Waveform](class_song.md#class-song-property-audio-file-waveform). Uses [WaveformGenerator](class_waveformgenerator.md#class-waveformgenerator) Android plugin only for image generation (no metadata).

<a id="class-add-track-private-method-fallback-generate-waveform-png-with-audio-preview"></a>

WAV-only fallback waveform generator using audio_preview addon… This is used when FFMPEG addon says “success!” but no PNG appears on disk… so not really a success

<a id="class-add-track-private-method-resolve-genre-tag-to-id3-int"></a>

`int` **\_resolve_genre_tag_to_id3_int**(genre_tag: `String`) [🔗](#class-add-track-private-method-resolve-genre-tag-to-id3-int)

Map tag text / numeric ID3 index from files into Song’s int genre IDs (0..191, 192 CR, 193 RX… or nada) stolen from [https://exiftool.org/TagNames/ID3.html](https://exiftool.org/TagNames/ID3.html)
